title: Simply 3D Zinc [Create]
description: A resource pack that makes the zinc ores from create simply 3D.
body:
Not so quality made resource pack 3D zinc ore for create mod. 

## Showcase:

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc671c15a0e032d1d583a94261f3c3da75d8e19a.png)

In addition you can mix it with my other zinc resoursepack for glowing features and glint animation [Simply Glowing Zinc](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simply-glowing-zinc):
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
